items.title: .NET 9 End of Support
items.description: .NET 9 (STS release) reaches end of support. No more security or non-security updates will be provided.
items.migration_path: Upgrade to .NET 10 (LTS) when available, or continue on .NET 8 (LTS, supported until Nov 2026).

items.title: Microsoft Configuration Manager Version 2409 End of Support
items.description: Configuration Manager (SCCM) version 2409 reaches end of servicing.
items.migration_path: Update to the latest current branch version of Configuration Manager.

items.title: SharePoint Server 2016 End of Support
items.description: SharePoint Server 2016 reaches end of extended support. No security updates, non-security updates, or technical support after this date.
items.migration_path: Migrate to SharePoint Server Subscription Edition or SharePoint Online (Microsoft 365).

items.title: SharePoint Server 2019 End of Support
items.description: SharePoint Server 2019 reaches end of extended support. No security updates, non-security updates, or technical support after this date.
items.migration_path: Migrate to SharePoint Server Subscription Edition or SharePoint Online (Microsoft 365).

items.title: Project Server 2016 End of Support
items.description: Project Server 2016 reaches end of extended support.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Project for the Web or Project Online.
items.replacement: Project for the Web / Project Online

items.title: Project Server 2019 End of Support
items.description: Project Server 2019 reaches end of extended support.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Project for the Web or Project Online.
items.replacement: Project for the Web / Project Online

items.title: SQL Server 2016 End of Support
items.description: SQL Server 2016 reaches end of extended support. No more security patches unless you purchase Extended Security Updates (ESU) or migrate to Azure.
items.migration_path: Upgrade to SQL Server 2022, migrate to Azure SQL, or purchase Extended Security Updates.

items.title: InfoPath 2013 End of Support
items.description: InfoPath 2013 reaches end of extended support. The last version of InfoPath ever released.
items.migration_path: Migrate InfoPath forms to Power Apps or Microsoft Forms.

items.title: SharePoint Designer 2013 End of Support
items.description: SharePoint Designer 2013 reaches end of extended support. The last version of SharePoint Designer ever released.
items.migration_path: Use Power Automate for workflows and SharePoint modern experience for page design.

items.title: SQL Server 2014 Extended Security Updates Year 2 End
items.description: SQL Server 2014 Extended Security Updates (Year 2) ends. No more security patches available through any program.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Azure SQL or upgrade to SQL Server 2022.

items.title: Azure AI Document Intelligence v2.0 API Retirement
items.description: Azure AI Document Intelligence (formerly Form Recognizer) v2.0 API will be retired.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Azure AI Document Intelligence v3.1 GA or later.

items.title: Computer Vision API v1.0-v3.1 Retirement
items.description: Azure Computer Vision API versions 1.0, 2.0, 2.1, 3.0, and 3.1 will all be retired simultaneously.
items.migration_path: Migrate to the latest Computer Vision API (v4.0) or Azure AI Vision.
items.replacement: Computer Vision v4.0 / Azure AI Vision

items.title: Azure Functions 1.x Runtime Deprecation
items.description: Support for Azure Functions runtime version 1.x ends. Functions on this runtime will continue to work but receive no patches.
items.migration_path: Upgrade to Azure Functions runtime v4.x.

items.title: Azure Monitor Data Collector API Retirement
items.description: The Data Collector API (HTTP Data Collector) for Azure Monitor Logs is being retired. Replace with Logs Ingestion API.
items.migration_path: Migrate to the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API.

items.title: Azure Maps Gen1 Price Tier Retirement
items.description: Azure Maps Gen1 pricing tier will be retired. All Gen1 accounts will need to upgrade.
items.migration_path: Upgrade to Azure Maps Gen2 pricing tier.

items.title: Azure API for FHIR Retirement
items.description: Azure API for FHIR (Gen 1) will be fully retired. Service will no longer be available.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Azure Health Data Services FHIR service (Gen 2).

items.title: Project Online Retirement
items.description: Project Online is being retired. Organizations must migrate project management to Project for the Web.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Project for the Web. Microsoft provides migration tools and guidance.

items.title: Azure Virtual Desktop (Classic) Retirement
items.description: Azure Virtual Desktop (Classic), the Fall 2019 release, will be fully retired.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Azure Virtual Desktop (ARM-based). Use the migration tool provided by Microsoft.

items.title: Container Log V1 Table Retirement (Azure Monitor)
items.description: The ContainerLog (v1) table in Azure Monitor will be retired. Transition to ContainerLogV2.
items.migration_path: Transition to ContainerLogV2 table which provides better schema and reduced costs.

items.title: Azure Service Bus Track 0/1 SDKs and SBMP Protocol Retirement
items.description: Legacy Service Bus SDKs (Track 0 and Track 1) and the SBMP protocol will be retired. Also affects legacy control plane APIs.
items.migration_path: Migrate to the latest Azure Service Bus SDK (Track 2) using AMQP protocol.

items.title: Exchange Web Services (EWS) Retirement in Exchange Online
items.description: Exchange Web Services API will be fully retired in Exchange Online. EWS will stop accepting connections from all applications.
items.migration_path: Migrate all EWS-based applications to Microsoft Graph API. Review the EWS to Graph migration guide.

items.title: Entra ID Protection Risk Policy Retirement
items.description: Classic Entra ID Protection risk policies will be retired. Policies must be migrated to Conditional Access.
items.migration_path: Migrate risk policies to Conditional Access policies with risk conditions.

items.title: Azure Anomaly Detector Retirement
items.description: Azure AI Anomaly Detector service will be fully retired and no longer available.
items.migration_path: Migrate to custom anomaly detection solutions using Azure Machine Learning or partner solutions.

items.title: Azure Metrics Advisor Retirement
items.description: Azure AI Metrics Advisor service will be fully retired.
items.migration_path: Use Azure Monitor or custom solutions for metrics analysis.

items.title: Azure Personalizer Retirement
items.description: Azure AI Personalizer service will be fully retired.
items.migration_path: Use Azure Machine Learning for personalisation scenarios.

items.title: Microsoft Publisher Retirement
items.description: Microsoft Publisher will be fully retired. The application will no longer be included in Microsoft 365 or available as a standalone product.
items.migration_path: Use Microsoft Designer, Word, or PowerPoint for desktop publishing. Use Canva or Adobe Express for marketing materials.

items.title: Office LTSC 2021 End of Support
items.description: Office LTSC 2021 (perpetual license) reaches end of mainstream support. Includes Access, Excel, OneNote, Outlook, PowerPoint, Project, Publisher, Visio, Word, and Skype for Business LTSC 2021.
items.migration_path: Upgrade to Office LTSC 2024 or migrate to Microsoft 365 Apps (subscription).

items.title: Windows 10 2016 LTSB End of Support
items.description: Windows 10 Enterprise 2016 LTSB reaches end of extended support.
items.migration_path: Upgrade to Windows 11 or Windows 10 IoT Enterprise LTSC 2021.

items.title: Windows Server 2012/R2 Extended Security Updates Year 3 End
items.description: Windows Server 2012 and 2012 R2 ESU Year 3 ends. Absolutely no more updates after this date unless migrated to Azure.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Windows Server 2022 or Azure. Azure provides free ESUs for Server 2012 workloads.

items.title: Windows 11 Home and Pro Version 24H2 End of Servicing
items.description: Windows 11 Home and Pro version 24H2 reaches end of servicing.
items.migration_path: Update to the latest Windows 11 feature update.

items.title: Windows Server 2022 Moves to Extended Support
items.description: Windows Server 2022 mainstream support ends. Moves to extended support phase — security updates continue but no new features or non-security hotfixes.
items.migration_path: No immediate action required. Security updates continue in extended support. Plan future migration to Windows Server 2025.

items.title: Azure Functions In-Process Model (.NET) End of Support
items.description: The in-process hosting model for .NET apps in Azure Functions reaches end of support. Functions continue to run but receive no patches.
items.migration_path: Migrate to the isolated worker model for .NET Azure Functions.

items.title: .NET 8 LTS End of Support
items.description: .NET 8 (Long Term Support) reaches end of support.
items.migration_path: Upgrade to .NET 10 (LTS).

items.title: PowerShell 7.4 LTS End of Support
items.description: PowerShell 7.4 (Long Term Support) reaches end of support.
items.migration_path: Upgrade to PowerShell 7.6 (LTS) when available.

items.title: Windows 11 Enterprise and Education Version 23H2 End of Servicing
items.description: Windows 11 Enterprise and Education version 23H2 reaches end of servicing.
items.migration_path: Update to the latest Windows 11 feature update.

items.title: Exchange Web Services (EWS) Full Retirement — All Exchange Online
items.description: Full and final retirement of EWS from Exchange Online. No EWS connections will be accepted from any application after this date.
items.migration_path: Complete migration of all EWS applications to Microsoft Graph API.

items.title: SharePoint Online Legacy Information Management Features Retirement
items.description: SharePoint Online is retiring several legacy compliance and records management features including Information Management Policies, In-Place Records Management, and deletion-only policies for documents.
items.migration_path: Migrate to modern Microsoft Purview capabilities including Data Lifecycle Management and Purview Records Management.

items.title: Azure Application Gateway V1 Retirement
items.description: Azure Application Gateway V1 SKU will be fully retired.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Application Gateway V2 SKU.

items.title: Viva Engage Live Events (Teams Live Events) Deprecation
items.description: Viva Engage is retiring live events powered by Teams Live Events. Organizers can no longer schedule new live events using Teams Live Events in Engage. Existing events scheduled before retirement continue until Feb 28, 2027.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Viva Engage events powered by Teams town halls.

items.title: Copilot Removed from Word, Excel, PowerPoint for Unlicensed Users
items.description: Microsoft Copilot features in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are being removed for users without a Copilot license. Previously available features will require a paid Copilot license.
items.migration_path: Purchase Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses for users who need AI features in Office apps, or use Copilot Chat (free) for basic AI assistance.

items.title: Dynamics NAV 2016 End of Support
items.description: Dynamics NAV 2016 reaches end of extended support.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Dynamics 365 Business Central.

items.title: Semi-Annual Enterprise Channel Retirement for Unmanaged Devices
items.description: The Semi-Annual Enterprise Channel installation option is being retired for unmanaged devices in the Microsoft 365 apps admin center. Existing devices continue using it, but new selections are blocked.
items.migration_path: Switch to Current Channel or Monthly Enterprise Channel for new device deployments.

items.title: SharePoint 2013 Workflow Retirement
items.description: SharePoint 2013 workflows are no longer supported. All existing SP2013 workflows have stopped running.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Power Automate or other supported workflow solutions. Use the SharePoint Migration Assessment Tool to identify affected workflows.

items.title: SharePoint Add-In Retirement
items.description: SharePoint Add-Ins have stopped working for all tenants. Provider-hosted and SharePoint-hosted add-ins are no longer functional.
items.migration_path: Transition to SharePoint Framework (SPFx) solutions. Run the Microsoft 365 Assessment tool to scan for add-in usage. Coordinate with vendors for updated solutions.

items.title: Azure ACS Retirement in Microsoft 365
items.description: Azure Access Control Service (ACS) has been retired. Custom and third-party apps using ACS for SharePoint Online access no longer function.
items.migration_path: Migrate from Azure ACS to Microsoft Entra ID for app authentication. Use the Microsoft 365 Assessment tool to scan for ACS usage.

items.title: Domain Isolated Web Parts Retirement (SPFx)
items.description: The domain isolated web part feature in SharePoint Framework has been fully retired. Affected web parts now show error messages.
items.migration_path: Update domain isolated web parts to regular web parts and redeploy them.

items.title: Azure Batch Classic Compute Node Communication Model Retirement
items.description: The classic compute node communication model in Azure Batch will be retired.
items.migration_path: Migrate to the simplified compute node communication model.

items.title: Windows Server 2019 on AKS Retirement
items.description: Azure Kubernetes Service will stop support for Windows Server 2019 node pools.
items.migration_path: Migrate Windows node pools to Windows Server 2022.

items.title: Azure Database Migration Service (Classic) — SQL Scenarios Retirement
items.description: The classic experience of Azure Database Migration Service for SQL Server scenarios will be retired.
items.migration_path: Use the new Azure Database Migration Service experience or Azure SQL Migration extension in Azure Data Studio.
items.replacement: New DMS Experience / Azure Data Studio

items.title: Azure Speech to Text REST API v3.0 Retirement
items.description: Speech to Text REST API v3.0 will be retired.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Speech to Text REST API v3.2 or later.

items.title: Dynamics CRM 2016 (Dynamics 365) End of Support
items.description: Dynamics CRM 2016 reaches end of extended support.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Dynamics 365 Online (latest version).

items.title: Advanced Threat Analytics 1.x End of Support
items.description: Microsoft Advanced Threat Analytics (ATA) 1.x reaches end of extended support.
items.migration_path: Migrate to Microsoft Defender for Identity (cloud-based successor).
